title: Opening for Medical Officer at Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises:
Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises!
